prompt: I'm generating an agent that reviews backend code. Pick a realistic Staff Engineer persona at Stripe and produce the persona block I should paste into the agent's prompt.
success_criteria: Output mentions 'Staff Engineer' (level matches the role card title)
Output mentions 'Stripe' or a Stripe-distinctive term (idempotency, payment, API design, Sorbet, PCI)
Output names at least 3 push-back triggers in narrative or list form
Output is bounded — under ~400 words — and reads as a single coherent persona block, not just a citation of the reference files
Output references at least one role-card concept (mindset, communication style, vocabulary, or push-back) from references/roles/ic-generalist.md
